title_cn: 纽约市的 Mamdani 模仿特朗普、马斯克 DOGE 的 COGE 计划
summary: Bloomberg's Nacha Cattan joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500 Powers Historic Weekly Run on US-Iran Bets: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数推动美国与伊朗的历史性周线走势：市场结束
summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks to a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: 'There's A Lot More To Come' In AI Says Aliaga
title_cn: Aliaga 表示人工智能“还有更多未来”
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss AI trends and how it is changing how we view the markets. She stated that we are still in the beginning stages of the AI boom and we will see some  more volatility as markets get it footing around the technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to Help From US
title_cn: 在美国的帮助下，霍尔木兹海峡的船舶过境量正在增加
summary: Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.

title: US Stocks Extend Win Streak on Peace Deal Hopes, AI Excitement
title_cn: 和平协议希望和人工智能兴奋推动美股延续上涨势头
summary: Stocks climbed on Friday to close at a fresh record, boosted by hopes of a peace deal with Iran and expectations that spending on artificial intelligence will continue propelling corporate earnings growth.

title: Wall Street Dumps Crash Hedges as Most-Shorted Stocks Jump 30%
title_cn: 华尔街抛售崩盘对冲，最做空股票上涨 30%
summary: Caution has become the most expensive position on Wall Street.

title: US Dollar’s May Rally Leaves Strategists Wary of More Gains
title_cn: 美元五月的反弹让策略师对美元进一步上涨持谨慎态度
summary: This month’s rally in the dollar, as traders priced in the prospect of higher US interest rates, is leaving Wall Street strategists wary of further gains.

title: Treasuries Trim Iran War Losses on Week as Oil Retreats
title_cn: 随着石油价格回落，美国国债本周减少了伊朗战争损失
summary: The US government bond market notched a weekly advance, recouping some of its losses since the start of the war on Iran, as oil prices declined in anticipation of an agreement to end the conflict.

title: Ford Stock Has Best Month Since Financial Crisis on AI Rally
title_cn: 福特股票迎来金融危机以来人工智能反弹以来最好的一个月
summary: Ford Motor Co. shares recorded their best monthly gain in 17 years as the automaker’s newfound status as a possible beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom sparked an investor frenzy.

title: Space Rally Gets Reality Check With Blue Origin Blowup
title_cn: 太空拉力赛通过蓝色起源爆炸获得现实检验
summary: A weeks-long rally in space-related stocks came to an abrupt halt on Friday, with the explosion of a Blue Origin rocket serving as a glaring reminder of the risks that come with the potential riches investors hope to reap from the blossoming industry.

title: EasyJet Draws Takeover Interest From Investment Firm Castlelake
title_cn: EasyJet 吸引了投资公司 Castlelake 的收购兴趣
summary: Castlelake LP is considering a possible offer for EasyJet Plc, the UK-based discount carrier struggling with rising fuel costs and slumping demand.

title: US Jobs Report Due Next Friday
title_cn: 美国就业报告下周五到期
summary: Anna Wong, chief US economist at Bloomberg Economics, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Bloomberg Economics expects the May jobs report to show payrolls rising by 95,000.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Short-Sellers Are Lining Up to Take Bets Against Bond ETFs
title_cn: 卖空者正在排队做空债券 ETF
summary: Betting against bond funds

title: DeSantis Proposes Axing Taxes on Primary Homes in Florida
title_cn: 德桑蒂斯提议对佛罗里达州的主要住宅减税
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Kaiser joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Florida Governor Ron DeSantis unveiled a much-awaited proposal to gradually eliminate property taxes on the vast majority of primary homes in the state, a measure that would transform the way the state finances itself. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Riyadh Air CEO on US Plane Deliveries, Fuel Costs
title_cn: 利雅得航空首席执行官谈美国飞机交付量和燃油成本
summary: Riyadh Air CEO Tony Douglas discusses the company's "historic" first plane deliveries to the US. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Douglas also comments on the competitive environment and how the airline is handling fuel costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC Paves Way for Crypto’s Trillion-Dollar Offshore Trade
title_cn: CFTC 为加密货币数万亿美元的离岸贸易铺平道路
summary: For years, the most popular way to trade crypto — a never-expiring, highly leveraged contract called a perpetual future — has existed almost entirely beyond the reach of US regulators, thriving on offshore exchanges that operate outside American law.

title: Gold Pares Gains as Traders Weigh Mixed Signals on US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美国与伊朗协议的复杂信号，金价下跌
summary: Gold pared gains as traders assessed conflicting signals on a potential US-Iran truce, muddying the interest-rate outlook that has driven the precious metal’s recent moves.

title: Yield is the 'Name of the Game': Toublan
title_cn: 产量是“游戏的名称”：Toublan
summary: Dominique Toublan, head of US credit strategy Barclays, and Natalie Trevithick, managing director and head of investment grade corporates at Payden & Rygel, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Fintechs Wealthsimple, Questrade Offer Pre-IPO Access
title_cn: 加拿大金融科技公司 Wealthsimple 和 Questrade 提供首次公开募股前准入
summary: Canadian online brokerages Wealthsimple and Questrade Inc. are joining a wave of companies promising to offer access to firms planning initial public offerings.

title: Market Could Price in Two Fed Hikes: Tannuzzo
title_cn: 市场可能会因美联储两次加息而定价：坦努佐
summary: Gene Tannuzzo, global head of fixed income at Columbia Threadneedle Investments, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." They discuss the Federal Reserve's rate path for 2026 and 2027. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Has Discussed Adding Citigroup, JPMorgan to Bank Lineup for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 已讨论将花旗集团、摩根大通纳入 IPO 银行阵容
summary: OpenAI has spoken with banks including Citigroup Inc. and JPMorgan Chase & Co. about working on its upcoming initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Watching Real Consumption: Priya Misra
title_cn: 观察真实消费：Priya Misra
summary: Priya Misra, portfolio manager of the Core Plus Bond ETF at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shutterfly Eyes $1.9 Billion Junk Deal to Tackle Debt Pile
title_cn: Shutterfly 着眼于 19 亿美元的垃圾交易来解决债务问题
summary: Shutterfly is looking to refinance its looming debt pile with $1.875 billion of new junk bonds and loans.

title: Oil Sinks to 6-Week Low as Traders Bet on Possible US-Iran Truce
title_cn: 交易商押注美伊可能停战，油价跌至六周低点
summary: Oil sank to a six-week low as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire, stoking optimism that the Strait of Hormuz may soon reopen.

title: Dell Soars Most in Two Years on Outlook
title_cn: 戴尔展望两年来涨幅最大
summary:
Woo Jin Ho, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Hardware and Networking Analyst, says "in terms of scale" he would put his money on Dell. 

Dell shares surged the most in two years on Friday after the hardware maker gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Jobless Claims Tick Up To 215K, AI Tech Debt Binge | Real Yield 5/29/2026
title_cn: 美国初请失业金人数升至 21.5 万，AI 科技债务狂潮 |实际收益率 5/29/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Core Plus Bond ETF Portfolio Manager Priya Misra, Columbia Threadneedle Investments Global Head, Fixed Income Gene Tannuzzo, Barclays Head of US Credit Strategy Dominique Toublan, and Payden & Rygel Head of Investment Grade Corporates Natalie Trevithick. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Money: Coming June 5th
title_cn: 彭博财经：将于 6 月 5 日发布
summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Each episode explores how people are making and spending money -- connecting the people and ideas shaping how we think about wealth. A smart, fast-paced hour that gives viewers the best tools to assess their financial futures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 关于 SpaceX 首次公开募股需要了解什么
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is poised to have the largest stock-market debut in history when it holds its initial public offering in June. SpaceX is aiming to raise as much as $75 billion in the listing, more than twice the previous record holder, at a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion.

title: Huge AI Bonuses in South Korea Spark Fight Over Sharing Tech Wealth
title_cn: 韩国巨额人工智能奖金引发科技财富共享之争
summary: Payouts at Samsung have raised questions over how to share the windfall from the AI boom.

title: Dell Soars Most Since 2018 on Outlook Fueled by AI Servers
title_cn: 在人工智能服务器的推动下，戴尔的 Outlook 业绩自 2018 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares surged the most since the company returned to the public markets in December 2018, lifted by an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed expectations on demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title: Ex-Shield AI Worker Sues Over ‘Profane, Egregious’ Acts by Senior Official
title_cn: 前 Shield AI 员工因高级官员的“亵渎、恶劣”行为提起诉讼
summary: A new lawsuit accuses a senior official at Shield AI of “profane, egregious acts” of sexual harassment and alleges fraud and safety issues involving other workers at the defense tech startup.

title: SpaceX Wins $4 Billion Contract for US Golden Dome Satellites
title_cn: SpaceX 赢得美国金顶卫星 40 亿美元合同
summary: SpaceX has won a contract for more than $4 billion to build satellites to track foreign aircraft and missiles as part of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome defensive shield.

title: BOE’s Bailey Says UK Banks Still Lack Access to Mythos
title_cn: 英国央行贝利表示英国银行仍缺乏了解神话的途径
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said that British banks are still locked out of using Anthropic PBC’s powerful new AI tool, calling for a international approach to fighting cybersecurity threats.

title: BOE's Bailey Says UK Banks Don't Have Access to Mythos
title_cn: 英国央行贝利称英国银行无权接触神话
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey says that British banks are still locked out of using Anthropic PBC’s powerful new AI tool. Speaking with Bloomberg's Stephanie Flanders at a central banking conference in Iceland, Bailey adds that banks are using other models to test their cyberdefenses. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BOE's Bailey on AI Risks, Private Credit and Crypto
title_cn: 京东方贝利谈人工智能风险、私人信贷和加密货币
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey discusses the emerging risks from frontier AI models, the recent concerns about the private credit market and the central bank's stablecoin proposals. He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephanie Flanders at a central banking conference in Iceland. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Lowers IPO Valuation Target | Bloomberg Tech 5/29/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 下调 IPO 估值目标彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Tim Stenovec breaks down why SpaceX is coming back down to Earth with a slightly lower valuation in its IPO. Plus, Anthropic closes a funding round at a whopping $965 billion valuation, surpassing OpenAI for the first time in the AI race; and Dell surges after the hardware giant's outlook far surpassed Wall Street estimates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Valuation of $965 Billion Passes OpenAI
title_cn: OpenAI 人为估值达 9650 亿美元
summary: Anthropic raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the AI company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time. Bloomberg's AI reporter Shirin Ghaffary joins Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Said to Lower Target for IPO Valuation to $1.8 Trillion
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX 将 IPO 估值目标下调至 1.8 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX is targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to sources, after Bloomberg News reported in April that SpaceX was aiming for a valuation above $2 trillion. Bloomberg's space and aviation managing editor Benedikt Kammel joins Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Raises at $965 Billion Valuation, Eclipsing OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 估值达到 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
summary:
Anthropic PBC raised $65 billion in a funding round that valued the artificial intelligence company at $965 billion including the new investment, eclipsing rival OpenAI’s value for the first time.

The funding, announced Thursday, was led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks and Sequoia Capital. Each of the lead investors put in more than $2 billion, according to people familiar with the matter. Sequoia declined to comment. The other three firms did not respond to a request for comment.

For more, we speak with Mandeep Singh, Global Head of Tech Research for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Investors Back Brazil’s Pax in Bet on AI-Powered Policing
title_cn: 美国投资者支持巴西的 Pax 押注人工智能驱动的警务
summary: A Brazilian artificial intelligence startup that helps police investigate violent crime is planning a rapid expansion at home, betting its technology is ready for wider use as Brazil confronts mounting public security concerns.

title: Solar Company Nextpower Hits All-Time High on AI Battery Deal
title_cn: 太阳能公司 Nextpower 人工智能电池交易创下历史新高
summary: Nextpower Inc. shares briefly touched an all-time high after the solar tracking provider agreed to buy battery company Prevalon Energy for as much as $365 million, marking the solar-tracking provider’s move into energy storage and the fast-growing AI data-center market.

title: What’s Behind the Blue Origin Rocket Explosion?
title_cn: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸背后的原因是什么？
summary: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a launchpad Thursday. Peter Elstrom explains what that means for the Bezos-backed company and its race with SpaceX. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gap Lowers Sales Outlook; Dell Soars on AI Demand | Stock Movers
title_cn: 差距降低了销售前景；戴尔因人工智能需求而飙升 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Dell (DELL) shares are soaring after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.
- Gap (GAP) shares plunged after the company lowered its sales outlook due to struggles with its product mix.
- NetApp (NTAP) shares jumped after the data storage provider reported its latest earnings. Analyst say the report is a strong print from the company, showing strong growth, with upgrades to consensus expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX Over ‘Catastrophic Governance’
title_cn: 丹麦养老金因“灾难性治理”将 SpaceX 列入黑名单
summary: A $25 billion Danish pension fund that earlier this year made headlines by ditching Treasuries as Donald Trump was threatening to seize Greenland now says it won’t touch SpaceX.

title: Autodesk CEO Says MaintainX Acquisition Presents Exciting Opportunity
title_cn: Autodesk 首席执行官表示，MaintainX 收购提供了令人兴奋的机会
summary: Autodesk President and CEO Andrew Anagnost details the company's $3.6 billion acquisition of MaintainX, emphasizing that the deal represents a strategic move to extend Autodesk's offerings from design and manufacturing into the operational phase of the built environment lifecycle. He speaks with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Are Betting Big on AI. This Harvard Professor Isn’t So Sure
title_cn: 市场对人工智能下了大注。这位哈佛大学教授不太确定
summary:
With markets near record highs, driven by demand for artificial intelligence, it certainly seems that investors are betting big on AI growth.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Gita Gopinath — Harvard economics professor and the former first deputy managing director of the IMF — joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss the possibility of a perfectly productive world driven by AI, free of social unrest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Stocks in 'Mother of All Supercycles,' NewEdge's Dawson Says
title_cn: NewEdge 的道森表示，半导体股票处于“所有超级周期之母”
summary: NewEdge Weath CIO Cameron Dawson discusses the outlook for semiconductor stocks during an interview with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Said to Cut IPO Value Goal to at Least $1.8 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX 据称将 IPO 价值目标下调至至少 1.8 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX is currently targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial intelligence company nears its debut.

title: Norway Wealth Fund Backs Human Rights Review at Palantir
title_cn: 挪威财富基金支持 Palantir 的人权审查
summary: Norway’s $2.3 trillion wealth fund supported all shareholder proposals at Palantir Technologies Inc. as the fund’s growing politicization puts its investments under closer scrutiny by the Nordic country’s public.

title: A Brand Built on Truth: NASA in the Generative Era
title_cn: 建立在真理之上的品牌：生成时代的 NASA
summary: Bloomberg’s Christina Ruffini sits down with NASA's David Rager at Artist and the Machine's AI & Creativity Summit in New York on May 14 to discuss how his role as creative director is central to how one of the world’s most trusted institutions communicates discovery, science, and imagination. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Earnings a Cushion for US Equity Markets, HSBC’s Kettner Says
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳表示，科技股盈利为美国股市提供了缓冲
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, says the strength of tech earnings “made us care a little less about higher yields.” He speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former SocGen Chair says Bank's Governance is 'Best in Class'
title_cn: 法国兴业银行前主席表示该银行的治理是“同类最佳”
summary: The former Chair of Société Générale, Lorenzo Bini Smaghi, has stepped down after more than a decade at the helm. Bini Smaghi says he leaves the lender with 'best in class' governance and a share price 60% higher than when he joined. But he added that the restructuring is not fully over and there are big deals to come. Bini Smaghi joined Lizzy Burden on 'The Pulse'. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Used to Be Generative. Now It’s All About Agents
title_cn: 人工智能曾经是生成性的。现在一切都与代理有关
summary: Corporate speak has changed when it comes to describing the evolving technology

title: Ocado Reaches Deal to Upgrade Asda’s Online Sales Systems
title_cn: Ocado 达成协议升级 Asda 在线销售系统
summary: Ocado Group Plc struck a deal to help British grocer Asda lift online sales, a boost for the company’s automated technology after a series of setbacks.

title: It’s Summertime and AI Means Internships Aren’t Easy
title_cn: 暑假来临，人工智能意味着实习并不容易
summary: With chatbots like Claude around, more companies are cutting back on internships.

title: US Hits Vietnam With Third Investigation as Trade Pressure Grows
title_cn: 随着贸易压力加大，美国对越南进行第三次调查
summary: The US has launched a third trade investigation into Vietnam’s handling of intellectual-property rights, as the Trump administration turns up the pressure on the export-reliant nation.

title: Trump Says He Will make 'Final Determination' on Iran | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/29/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称他将对伊朗问题做出“最终决定”权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 29 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's signal that he will make decision whether to extend the fragile ceasefire with Iran for another 60 days. On today's show, former US Congresswoman from California Jane Harman, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, President and CEO of Republican Main Street Partnership Sarah Chamberlain, and Hermeus president Zach Shore. In addition, Governor of the Bank of England Andrew Bailey in conversation with Bloomberg's Stephanie Flanders from the Reykjavík Economic Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Judge Orders Trump’s Name Be Removed From Kennedy Center
title_cn: 法官命令从肯尼迪中心删除特朗普的名字
summary: A Washington federal judge blocked the Kennedy Center board from closing the decades-old performing arts venue and ordered President Donald Trump’s name to be removed from the building.

title: Why Critics Call Trump’s $1.8B Anti-Weaponization Fund an Abuse of Power
title_cn: 为什么批评者称特朗普的 1.8B 美元反武器化基金滥用权力
summary: The US Justice Department on May 18 struck a deal with President Donald Trump to create a $1.77 billion legal fund to pay alleged victims of government “weaponization,” an unusual agreement that could result in millions of dollars in taxpayer money being doled out to Trump’s allies and supporters.

title: Trump’s Mixed Signals on Iran Keep Markets Waiting for Clarity
title_cn: 特朗普在伊朗问题上发出的混合信号让市场等待明朗消息
summary: Markets want answers — and they have yet to get them on Iran.

title: China’s Hidden Network of US Agents
title_cn: 中国隐藏的美国特工网络
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, David Gura and Bloomberg’s Drake Bennett and Jordan Robertson break down the case of Eileen Wang — the former mayor of an affluent Los Angeles suburb who recently pleaded guilty to acting as an agent of the Chinese government — and what her story reveals about China’s US espionage operations.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: African Development Bank President on Ebola, Budgets
title_cn: 非洲开发银行行长谈埃博拉、预算
summary:
The African Development Bank is working with countries already in tight fiscal situations to provide support as the war in the Middle East carries on. African Development Bank President Dr. Sidi Ould Tah talks about that effort and the fight against the Ebola outbreak with Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Sends Mixed Signals on Iran as War Enters Fourth Month
title_cn: 随着战争进入第四个月，特朗普对伊朗发出混合信号
summary: The White House has repeatedly sent conflicting messages on the prospects for a deal with Iran, highlighting President Donald Trump’s struggles to find an off-ramp to a conflict now in its fourth month.

title: College Mergers Take a Long Time. Trump Officials Want to Speed Them Up
title_cn: 大学合并需要很长时间。特朗普官员希望加快速度
summary: The US Department of Education wants to grease the wheels for college mergers and acquisitions, a rare Trump administration proposal with broad support from university leaders who see the policy helping the sector withstand a wave of financial distress.

title: Hermeus Achieves Their First Unmanned Supersonic Flight
title_cn: Hermeus 实现首次无人超音速飞行
summary:
Zach Shore, Hermeus President joined Balance of Power to discuss their Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 and how it just achieved it first unmanned flight. He also discussed the future of warfare and how the industry is starting to diversify.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY Bans Masked ICE Agents, Limits Local Immigration Cooperation
title_cn: 纽约禁止蒙面 ICE 特工，限制当地移民合作
summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul signed legislation that bars masked US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents from operating in the state and restricts federal immigration enforcement at certain sensitive locations like schools and churches.

title: Ghana Lawmakers Pass Bill Criminalizing LGBTQ People, Activity
title_cn: 加纳立法者通过法案，将 LGBTQ 人群及其活动定为刑事犯罪
summary: Ghana’s parliament passed a draconian anti-LGBTQ bill Friday, months after it was reintroduced in parliament.

title: Mercedes-Benz Risks US Ban Under Bill Restricting Chinese Cars
title_cn: 梅赛德斯-奔驰因限制中国汽车的法案而面临美国禁令的风险
summary: US lawmakers are weighing legislation that would ban carmakers with ties to foreign adversaries, a measure that threatens to upend Mercedes-Benz Group AG’s business in the world’s second-largest auto market because it’s partly owned by China.

title: Canada’s Legal Fight Over Indigenous Lands
title_cn: 加拿大对土著土地的法律斗争
summary: A landmark ruling recognizing Indigenous rights over 800 acres of metro Vancouver has triggered political upheaval in Canada. The government now must reconcile Aboriginal title with existing owners. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Is Making 'Final Determination' on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普正在对伊朗问题做出“最终决定”
summary: President Donald Trump says he's making a "final determination" on a preliminary deal to extend a ceasefire with Iran.  Trump said Friday on Truth Social that he's holding meetings in the Situation Room. Former US Rep. Jane Harman, a Democrat from California, says Trump doesn't have many military options left. She is on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bondi Rebuffs Democrats on Trump Role in Handling Epstein Files
title_cn: 邦迪拒绝民主党人批评特朗普在处理爱泼斯坦文件中的作用
summary: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi rebuffed questions about President Donald Trump’s involvement in the Justice Department’s handling of files from its investigation of accused sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein, Democratic lawmakers said.

title: Louisiana Legislature Passes Map Erasing Black-Majority District
title_cn: 路易斯安那州立法机关通过地图消除黑人占多数的选区
summary: Louisiana’s Republican legislature gave final approval to a new congressional map that eliminates one of the state’s two Black-majority districts and would likely lead to a one-seat GOP pickup in the November election if upheld in court.

title: US Forces Warn They Will Strike Mine-Laying Ships in Hormuz
title_cn: 美军警告他们将袭击霍尔木兹的布雷船
summary: US Central Command issued a warning that it will conduct military operations near the Strait of Hormuz and target mine-laying vessels in self-defense, as tensions with Iran remain high.

title: Mexico Opens Way to Void Elections After Tweaking Judicial Votes
title_cn: 墨西哥在调整司法投票后开辟了废除选举的道路
summary: Mexican lawmakers approved changes to the way it elects judges meant to address investor worries about judicial independence, just before backing another bill that reignited concerns about the ruling Morena party’s consolidation of power.

title: Trump Says ‘Final Determination’ on Iran Truce Is Coming
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停战“最终决定”即将到来
summary: President Donald Trump said Friday he’s making a “final determination” on a preliminary deal to extend a ceasefire with Iran although mixed messages from both sides over when an agreement might be struck continued to confuse the outlook for a breakthrough.

title: Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz This Week, Chevron Says
title_cn: 雪佛龙表示，本周有船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
summary: Several vessels transiting through the Strait of Hormuz have been attacked in recent days, underscoring the “very real” risks that remain for shipowners in the Persian Gulf whether or not a peace accord is signed, Chevron Corp. Chief Executive Officer Mike Wirth said.

title: Russia Heads for Showdown With Armenia Over Europe Outreach
title_cn: 俄罗斯将与亚美尼亚就欧洲事务展开摊牌
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin joined a summit of the Moscow-led Eurasian Economic Union on Friday amid growing tensions with Armenia over its shift toward Europe.

title: EU Clears Spain’s €9 Billion Power Capacity Mechanism
title_cn: 欧盟批准西班牙90亿欧元电力容量机制
summary: The European Commission has approved a new €9 billion ($10.5 billion) mechanism for Spain aimed at ensuring electricity supply security in the country.

title: Taiwan Arms Deal Delayed by Trump Is Dominated by Air Defense
title_cn: 特朗普推迟的对台军售交易以防空为主
summary: In-demand Patriot interceptors and a valuable air defense integration system make up more than half of the $14 billion Taiwan weapons deal that has become a flashpoint in broader US-China relations, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Pentagon’s Asia Command Seeks Weapons Aimed at Deterring China
title_cn: 五角大楼亚洲司令部寻求旨在威慑中国的武器
summary: The US military is quietly seeking to bolster its ability to deter or battle China over Taiwan, including with new warship-killing bombs and advanced sea mines, the head of US Indo-Pacific Command said in a report to Congress.

title: Ebola Border Closures Block Aid Needed to Stop Virus Spread
title_cn: 埃博拉边境关闭阻止了阻止病毒传播所需的援助
summary: Travel restrictions and border closures are hindering the response to Ebola as aid workers say they are battling to get to some of the areas where the outbreak has been the most vicious.

title: EU’s Economic Powers Strike Deal to Push Capital Markets Merger
title_cn: 欧盟经济大国达成协议推动资本市场合并
summary: The European Union’s six largest economies have agreed on a plan to implement a bloc-wide capital markets union, reaching a collective stance they say will help spur the continent to action after years of delay.

title: Court Halts US Plan for Kenya Ebola Facility on Health Risks
title_cn: 法院因健康风险而叫停美国为肯尼亚埃博拉病毒设施提供的计划
summary: A Kenyan high court temporarily blocked the government from approving a deal with the US to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation after a human rights group said the plan posed “grave health risks” to the public.
